block.trackworked.track_level_controller: _Input rotation_ to tilt and adjust suspension across the ship. Try different orientations!
block.trackworked.med_simple_wheel.toolt: Proprietary Final Drive technology allows this to reach the same speeds as the larger wheel!
block.trackworked.horn.tooltip.summary: Activates via redstone, _right click_ to set the pitch.
Makes the suspension stiffer! _Sneak_ to make it less stiff.
Makes the track suspension _less bouncy_! _Sneak_ to make it bouncier.
_Move wheels_ back and forth depending on where you click.
When the stiffness gauge is used,
When the dampening gauge is used,
When the power wrench is used,
Multiple tools for working with tracks, packed into one convenient kit!
death.attack.trackworked.run_over.player: %1$s was thrown under the bus by %2$s
trackworked.ponder.tracks.text_1: Disclaimer: Tracks only work on assembled VS2 ships!
trackworked.ponder.tracks.text_3: tracks are built in a row.
trackworked.ponder.tracks.text_4: Tracks are powered via connected sprockets.
trackworked.ponder.wheels.text_1: Disclaimer: Wheels only work on assembled VS2 ships!
trackworked.ponder.wheels.text_2: Wheels are placed like, well, wheels
trackworked.ponder.wheels.text_3: Drive the wheels via the inner side,
trackworked.ponder.wheels.text_4: Or don't connect them, which lets the wheel spin freely.
trackworked.ponder.wheels.text_5: Power a wheel with redstone to steer it,
trackworked.ponder.wheels.text_6: and the opposite side will automatically follow.
trackworked.ponder.oleo.text_1: Disclaimer: Oleo wheels only work on assembled VS2 ships!
trackworked.ponder.oleo.text_2: There are two variants of landing gear - Use a wrench to switch between them.
trackworked.ponder.oleo.text_3: Apply a Redstone signal to the sides of the block to steer,
trackworked.ponder.oleo.text_4: and apply to the front or back of the block to brake.
trackworked.ponder.oleo.text_5: Use contraption mechanisms to stow your landing gear after takeoff.
